reviews.review_description:
Gameplay: you're inside a cockpit, and you grab a gun turret joystick with each hand. You can move the turrets around, and press the triggers to fire them. The ship flies on its own, and it's not too fast or shaky, which I think really helps decrease potential motion sickness.

The world is interesting and colorful, and there's lots of different targets to hit. But I wish there was more diversity to the gameplay. I kind of felt like I was just holding down the triggers the whole time, and blowing up a lot of stationary hunks of metal. The most fun targets are the enemy ships, the approaching sealed tunnel walls, and the spiraling caterpillar things. I found myself testing other buttons to shoot different kinds of ammo, like missiles or something, but to no avail. Hopefully there's more to come in the future!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the detailed feedback! We really appreciate it. We've been working on some new systems to add more intractability to the cockpit, as well as a new heat system. We found that there was little reason to not-shoot, so adding in a heat system means you need to pick your shots a bit more :)

reviews.review_description:
This game is amazing. Perfect for players who get motion sickness in other games. This is a rail shooter meaning you don’t have to worry about moving. It takes you where you got to go. 

My wife and I sit in bed and play together. It’s so fun. Putting out fires in the cockpit, coordinating targets... Devs you did such a good job on this and I can’t wait to see what comes of it!

The only things missing are more missions and an endless mode. But even as it is this game is 5 stars hands down!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the awesome review! We're really glad you're enjoying the game!

reviews.review_description:
Cool cartoon graphics like being on a rollercoaster with guns and no rails.
Story is lame but it's actually fun with headphones as the sound is good with the explosion sounds I felt a bit quesy on one part but apart from that yh ad play it again it has repeatability but only to a point unless they bring more levels out. I like how you can adjust your seat... easy when lying in bed.

developer_response.body: Hey Paul :) Thanks for checking out Sky Squadron and for the awesome review. It's always good to know about comfort issue because we want to make it as smooth experience for everyone. Hopefully you can check out our future updates and let us know what you think!

reviews.review_description: Very fun game.  Can not wait for new content. Well worth downloading and trying out. Voices in background are entertaining as well.  Good work!

developer_response.body: Thanks :) Really happy to hear you're enjoying the game. We've just pushed out a new level to play test a few things, so hopefully you enjoy it! We'll have even more content out soon!

reviews.review_description: Great game

developer_response.body: Hey Zafer! Glad you enjoyed the game :) We've just released a new playtest level, and we'll have more coming out again soon. We'd love to know what you think about the new Outback level!

reviews.review_description:
I wasnt expecting to enjoy this game as much as I did.

It's a fun, addictive arcade shooter. 

Its a quick game, managed to complete one timeline. Cant blow up that train though quick enough!!

Cannot wait for more levels. I really liked the cheesy Australian dialogue!! 

If you take life too seriously or hate fun you wont like this. If your up for a bit of a laugh you wont regret playing.

developer_response.body: Good news! We've got more content we just pushed out! Really happy to hear you're enjoying the game (and our cheese Australian voices)

reviews.review_description: This is a rail shooter star fox like game where you only control the guns. Not terrible.

reviews.review_title: My favourite app in the citadel
reviews.review_description: Enough said!
This is something I might buy when it goes into the official store.

developer_response.body: Thanks Thyechean! Really glad you're thinking about buying! We've got more stuff to play test coming shortly.

reviews.review_title: On the right path but unplayable due to
reviews.review_description:
Painful truth warning: I only tried the first level, because the game currently is unplayable due to the worst voice acting I have ever heard.

The core mechanics are on the right path, although the lack of any sort of reload or cool down system quickly makes it boring and the repetitive sound of the endless machine gun gets to your head after just a few minutes. There almost isn't any variation to what you do. It's just pew pew pew pew pew pew pew pew pew pew pew pew pew pew (continues). There is a mechanic when your plane takes damage where you have to pat the fire to extinguish it, so it makes you almost want to take damage just to have something else to do.

Maybe it's there on other levels, but it need some variation. Reloading, or cool downs, or other weapons for specific enemies, calling in back, buttons in the cockpit etc.

Current the game is based on being able to aim. It needs more mechanics where you have to prioritize, make a tradeoff, take (cool down) timers into consideration.

developer_response.body: Hey Leto! Thanks for trying Sky Squadron, and sorry you didn't like the voice acting (a lot of it is mine, and I'm definitely _not_ a professional voice actor :P). We've heard your issues with the shooting, and have a few things we're looking at getting in to mix it up in future updates. Some of them may be the suggestions you've got in your review ;)

reviews.review_title: Charming and promising gun turret game.
reviews.review_description:
I love this. It's not quite perfect but for a beta it has me very excited for the finished game. I'll happily get it on Steam VR and Quest because the world needs a quirky Australian themed, low poly, talking animal Gun turret shooter. I love the graphical style, I love the Star fox inspired dialog, I love the shooting action. It's free right now so seriously, if anything nice anyone has said about it here has you slightly interested you should download it immediately. 

To the Devs: thank you. This is seriously brilliant. 
My notes are as follows:
Is there a smart bomb? I couldn't figure it out if there is. 
Toggling the grip is a very welcome feature.
The guns over heating seems a bit random to me. Some times I can hold the fire buttons down for ages with out them ever over heating. Some times it just suddenly happens. I would like to see a heat meter. If there is one in the game and I have missed it, I am sorry.
I have these adorable Koala hands but they don't seem to do much. They grip gun controls and that is it. I'd like to have moments in the game where I flip switches in the gun room or press a big "eject" button or something similar. 
Power ups or gun up grades. I didn't see any, sorry if I missed them. More powerful blasts, shields, gun damage and gun repair would be things I'd love to see brought over from Star fox. 
Where are the rings for my squadron to fly through? Seriously now, how can you have a starfox tribute without floating rings?

Keep up the great work. I am very looking to giving you money in exchange for the finished game.

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the kind review, and the amazing feedback. We're still working on new stuff all the time, so I'll pass on that feedback to the rest of the team :)

There is a heat meter there, but it must not be obvious enough if you missed it! We'll take that on board. One of the things we've been working on recently is tech to add more interactions to the cockpit, so should have more of that in the future too :)

reviews.review_description: I gave this three stars for one reason and one reason only because the game is fun and amazing but it's not the full game I can only play like three boards and that sucks so it’s only a Demo and I can’t wait to purchase the full game!!! I just hate when they do that it’s like a tease like I want the full game￼

reviews.review_title: A fun and charming take on "Star Fox"
reviews.review_description:
I gotta say, I didn't expect much out of this game when I downloaded it. Just a fun little demo of something that will never really be as great as it can be, but I WAS WRONG. This game is simple, short but super charming and polished.

You have 3 difficulty levels: casual, normal and hard, with 1 "episode" available right now. The episode contains 5 levels total, with an A and B Option for level 2 and 3. These A and B options are not just alternative color schemes or something like that, they are full different levels with interesting set pieces and mechanics. My favorite is the B levels.

The characters are charming and not taken seriously, and the voice acting isn't either. That said however, a higher quality microphone may have been good for the VA work.

Graphically it's pretty nice! There is real time shadows and lots of interesting visuals in the levels.

My only real gripe with it at the moment is that the prescripted turns of the aircraft you are in are a bit jarring feeling a bit too jerky. They made me feel a bit queasy anytime they happened.

I definitely recommend the game, just note that it is very much so a beta and you can definitely tell that it is, not just from the title.

developer_response.body: Hey MadBrax - thanks for all that detailed feedback. It's super useful for deciding where we focus next. Really appreciate the kind review!

reviews.review_description: Lame Star Fox on vr.......

developer_response.body: Hey Ocrtrain23, sorry to hear you didn't enjoy the game. We love any feedback we can get, so if you can share a little more detail about what you didn't like we'd love to take it on board for future updates

reviews.review_description: This game is great go knock yourself out with a bat why ya?

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! (knocking yourself out with a bat is optional, and not recommended by Trick Shot Development)

reviews.review_description: Even though this game is still in its early stages, its so good for it being like that! I loved shooting the little robots down trying to get me lol, i also loved all the voices! They are soooo awesome!!! I can’t believe nobody is talking about this game for how good it is!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the review Jahkk! Super glad you're enjoying it! :D

reviews.review_description: Won't even get past the title screen terrible controls

developer_response.body: Hey Philip, thanks for trying the game. Sorry to hear you were having problems with the controls. We're still heavily in development though, so if you let us know the problem we can work at making them better! :)

reviews.review_description: Cool graphics arcade game with a lot of fun, a little dizziness (considering you didn't pilot the ship its great, but you can feel it some times) Fun experience for children, limited as any demo could be.

The attempt to give you a rail shooter akin to an in cockpit star fox is easily seen upon the start of this title. This is not a bad thing but it does not hit the mark for many fans of those series which can be gleaned from other reviews here. However,  I found the game a good starter for individuals new to VR. My major gripe was from controller tracking issues which caused me to only utilize one blaster at time or not point at targets I need to hit due to my hands not registering on the in game controls.
Some sweet power ups, better voice acting and additional enemy variety between sections would flesh this out a long way towards becoming a five. 
I enjoy the comfort factor, ease of pickup and play, and the ship's on fire mechanic. I think the game lends itself to multiple future biomes which could benefit from such a mechanic.  I am happy to see where this one goes and glad they opted for a beta. Rating it an average game at three but pray by release its a must buy and a 5 star experience.

developer_response.body: Hey Defninja - thanks for the detailed feedback! That's really helpful. We managed to track down a few controller grip issues, so hopefully we've fixed those on that front. We've also recently added full hand tracking support :) We're planning on adding more intractability into the ventral, and fleshed out some systems for adding more of that

reviews.review_description: If you were wanting to hop into a multiplayer match easily than youll be dissapointed you can rarely ever get into a multiplayer match and if you do its litteraly the most boring thing ever

developer_response.body: Hey LIXz - sorry to hear you didn't like Sky Squadron, but really appreciate you taking the time to let us know why. Multiplayer is definitely an issue with a small community, but if you jump on our discord you can probably find someone to play with if you want to give it another go. We've heard the feedback on the core shooting needing a bit more to it, and will be addressing that in a future update :)
